meta.title: Search input field
meta.description: This pattern component integrates the SearchInput within a FormField using a simple, consistent, and opinionated API.

mdx:
## Overview

SearchInputField is a pattern component that combines the FormField wrapper with the SearchInput component. This integration provides a complete form field experience including accessible labels, helper text descriptions, info popovers for supplementary information, and comprehensive validation and error handling, all through a simplified, opinionated API.

The component features a built-in search icon, a clear button that appears when text is entered, keyboard shortcuts (Escape to clear, Enter to submit), and supports various visual variants and sizes.

### Resources

For detailed guidance on the individual components that make up this pattern, consult the component guidelines:

- [SearchInput Guidelines](/components/inputs/searchinput) - Search input patterns, interaction guidelines, and accessibility standards
- [FormField Guidelines](/components/inputs/formfield) - Label options, helper text, validation patterns, and form field accessibility
- [Storybook](https://nimbus-storybook.vercel.app/?path=/docs/patterns-fields-searchinputfield--docs)
